name: DILI - Comprehensive Provider Query (Multi-Resource, Multi-System)
description: Provider-level query identifying DILI patients via Condition (4 codes across SNOMED + ICD-10) + MedicationRequest (offending drug) + Observation (ALT threshold). Mirrors the full published PheKB DILI algorithm.
prompt: I need to identify all patients with potential drug-induced liver injury for a hepatology safety review. Some have a coded DILI or toxic liver disease diagnosis. Others are on a known hepatotoxin (methotrexate) without a DILI diagnosis. Others have severely elevated ALT suggesting hepatocellular injury without a documented diagnosis. Run multiple FHIR queries — diagnosis (multi-system), methotrexate, and ALT >=225 U/L — and union the patient sets.

prompts.broad: Find all DILI patients — by multi-system diagnosis (SNOMED + ICD-10 K71.9, K72.0, R74.01), by methotrexate prescription, or by ALT >=5x ULN (>=225 U/L). Run multiple queries and union.
prompts.expert: Run three queries. (1) Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|427399008,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K71.9,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K72.0,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|R74.01 — DILI dx. (2) MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|105585 — methotrexate. (3) Observation?code=http://loinc.org|1742-6&value-quantity=ge225 — elevated ALT. Union the patient IDs.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Multi-query union for DILI: dx (multi-system) + meds + ALT threshold.
